name: lone-star-hvac-video
description: Remotion video production for Lone Star HVAC — San Antonio

scripts.render: npx remotion render src/index.ts LoneStarPromo out/lonestar-promo.mp4
scripts.render:short: npx remotion render src/index.ts LoneStarShort out/lonestar-short.mp4
scripts.render:still: npx remotion still src/index.ts LoneStarPromo out/thumbnail.png --frame=30
